title: Effusiella retusa
taxonomy: Effusiella retusa is classified as a species of lichen-forming fungus in the family Graphidaceae. It belongs to the genus Effusiella, which is a group of fungi known for their distinctive lichenized growth habit. The species E. retusa is thought to be native to tropical regions of the world, although its exact distribution is not well documented. Effusiella retusa is closely related to other species within the Graphidaceae family, which includes over 1,000 species of lichen-forming fungi. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and relationships of E. retusa within the fungal kingdom.
